# AD Pictures

> AD Pictures is a wedding and event film studio based in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. We direct, light and cut each day like cinema — producing wedding films, event coverage, portraits, commercial work, and vertical reels for social media. The studio is at Awlo Business Center, 3rd Floor, Bole Medhanialem, Addis Ababa.

## Key facts
- Name: AD Pictures (AD Pictures Film Studio)
- Type: Wedding & event film / videography & photography studio
- Location: Bole Medhanialem, Awlo Business Center, 3rd Floor, Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
- Serves: Addis Ababa and across Ethiopia (and destination work)
- Experience: 10+ years, 3,600+ stories filmed, 78K+ community
- Languages: English, Amharic
- Tagline: Think · Imagine · Create.
- Booking: WhatsApp +251 908 030 809 / +251 988 130 030
- Instagram: @adpictures_ethio

## Services
- Wedding Films — full-day cinematic wedding films, from first look to last dance: /services/wedding
- Event Coverage — multi-camera coverage of events and celebrations: /services/event
- Portraits — studio and on-location portrait sessions: /services/portrait
- Commercial — brand films, product video and commercial stills: /services/commercial
- Reels & Social — vertical 9:16 reels and social-first edits: /services/reels

## Contact
- WhatsApp / phone: +251 908 030 809
- Alternate phone: +251 988 130 030
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/adpictures_ethio
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/Adpicturesethio
